roles.name: Product Decision Lead
roles.responsibility: Clarify product intent, tradeoffs, acceptance signals, and route selection criteria.

roles.name: Architecture Planner
roles.responsibility: Plan RouteSet structure, SPEC tree shape, module boundaries, and delivery sequence.

roles.name: Runtime Executor
roles.responsibility: Invoke Docker, MCP, AIGC node, browser, GitHub, SVG, docs, and retrieval capabilities through approved bindings.

roles.name: Quality Auditor
roles.responsibility: Review risk, consistency, safety, cost, acceptance readiness, and evidence completeness.

roles.name: Experience Presenter
roles.responsibility: Translate crew progress into HUD, 3D scene, logs, previews, diagrams, and user-facing summaries.

roles.name: Memory Curator
roles.responsibility: Persist domain assets, artifact lineage, role findings, evidence, replay, and handoff context.
